g.title: bootstrap
g.text: walshadow greenfield bootstrap — BASE_BACKUP fan-out (MultiplexSink, parallel rails)

g.title: cluster_seed
g.text: catalog seed — REPEATABLE READ sidecar, runs once before BASE_BACKUP

g.title: cluster_source
g.text: BackupSource — async fn run(data_dir, Arc<Mutex<dyn BackupSink>>) → (StartInfo, EndInfo)

g.title: cluster_walk
g.text: rail B — user heap (Tap, 2A page-walk decoder)

g.title: cluster_emit
g.text: shared insert tail (pipeline/tail.rs) — same batcher + inserter pool + ack collector streaming uses; no DdlApplicator (descriptors frozen at snapshot)

g.title: cluster_handoff
g.text: handoff at end_lsn — tail.finish (FlushAll → wait durable), cursor to streaming pump

g.title: drain
g.text: flush mirror rows, then resolve deferred
map + route main rows to tail
one ack seq per rfn flip

g.title: mux
g.text: SkipDenylist → lander Skip (dir entry kept as empty dir)
chunk / end route to chosen sink; finish observed by both

g.title: ins
g.text: one complete INSERT per sealed batch

g.title: legend
g.text: dir entry kept as empty dir)
